Theorem speano5 16714
Description: Version of peano5 4720 when is assumed to be a set, allowing a proof from the core axioms of CZF. (Contributed by BJ, 19-Nov-2019.) (Proof modification is discouraged.)
Assertion
Ref Expression
speano5
Distinct variable group:   ,
Allowed substitution hint:   ()
